_note: D3 — P1-only dev clearance shim (ADR-0016 / D-P1-6). Maps a dev caller identity (X-Atlas-User header) to a clearance level. Active ONLY under the local/test profile; the simulated IdP in P3 (ADR-0003) supersedes this with a verifiable claim. A request may instead pass X-Atlas-Clearance directly. NEVER enable in a shared/prod environment.
